Instruction: Walk forward along the paved walkway, keeping the building with large glass windows on your right. Continue straight past the building as its facade changes to solid, angled grey panels. Follow the path as it curves slightly to the left and approach the red-painted crosswalk with yellow and white stripes. Walk across the crosswalk. Stop once you reach the other side of the street. The large, brightly illuminated rectangular display board standing on the grass ahead of you is your destination.
